reference: Hi, I think it cannot be related to soil or rock. Please get yourself evaluated by a gynecologist. Have a thyroid profile, prolactin level, and an ultrasound done to examine your uterus and ovaries. You can try ovulation induction with timed intercourse for conceiving. Talk to your doctor regarding this. I hope it helps.
